Vinod Khosla Was An Early Investor In OpenAI But He's No Fan Of Founder-Friendly Venture Capitalism: 'I Hate The Culture'
data.description: Vinod Khosla, an early investor in OpenAI and founder of Khosla Ventures, shared his views on what startup founders should expect from investors, criticizing the "founder-friendly" culture in Silicon Valley and emphasizing the importance of honest, strategic feedback.
